channel.title: morningNewsSportsAndEntertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSportsAndEntertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Only DC Villain Movie That Doesn't Use Batman's Rogues' Gallery Came Out 4 Years Ago
The Voice Singer Dylan Carter's Official Cause of Death Released
item.description: The details have emerged surrounding the death of Dylan Carter. After the singer passed away on April 25 at the age of 24, South Carolina’s Colleton C...

item.title: The Rookie Kills Off Character in Major Twist Before Season 8 Finale

item.title: HBO Max's Sci-Fi Masterpiece With Near-Perfect Rotten Tomatoes Score Is One Of Its Best
